title: Zhuangzi, Chapter 14: Heavenly Revolutions
description: Chapter 14 of the Zhuangzi — the Taoist masterpiece of paradox and parable.
introduction: Chapter 14 of the Zhuangzi — the Taoist masterpiece of paradox and parable.

translation.text: Does heaven revolve? Does the earth stand still? Do the sun and moon contend for a place to shine? Who masterminds all this? Who pulls the strings? Who, resting inactive himself, gives the push that makes it go this way?
